note: Manual fallback list for canonical films the TMDB discover harvest cannot reach. Primary reasons: not tagged genre 878; short film format; extremely low TMDB vote count; cold war political drama miscategorized as Drama/Thriller only. All TMDB IDs should be verified before a production harvest run.

manifest.title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged Comedy/Drama only — not genre 878. Foundational Cold War paranoia text. Cannot be reached by any genre-878-gated discover plan.

manifest.title: The Manchurian Candidate
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged Drama/Thriller only. Canonical Cold War infiltration/conformity film. Not genre 878.

manifest.title: Fail Safe
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged Drama/Thriller only. Mutually assured destruction as speculative scenario. Not genre 878.

manifest.title: Alphaville, une étrange aventure de Lemmy Caution
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged genre 878 but ~1,200 votes. May appear in pool at low rank but too low-scored for calibration floor. Godard's sci-fi noir is mandatory curriculum.

manifest.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged genre 878. Low vote count (~3,500). Defining atomic-age first-contact film. Likely present in pool but at risk of calibration floor exclusion.

manifest.title: Colossus: The Forbin Project
manifest.reason: TMDB tagged genre 878. Very low vote count (~700). Direct predecessor to Ex Machina / Her narratively. Foundational AI-cinema text.

manifest.title: La Jetée
manifest.reason: 28-minute short film. TMDB does not surface short films in discover results regardless of genre tag. Founding text of the time-travel node. Must be injected manually. TMDB ID requires verification — short films are indexed inconsistently.
